---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working the way you expect
title: ""
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

**What happened**
A clear description of the bug.

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Open …
2. Click …
3. See …

**Expected**
What you expected to happen instead.

**Environment**
- Browser + version: (e.g. Chrome 124, Safari 17)
- OS: (e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11)
- Were you using a folder / single file / drag & drop?

**Notes**
Screenshots, console errors (DevTools → Console), or a sample `.md` that triggers
it — whatever helps. Remember mdread runs entirely in your browser, so nothing is
uploaded; please don't paste private file contents you don't want shared.
